name: One mechanism for many mental spaces: a shared router over a value slot in language models
content: Language builds discourse contexts other than the actual: a painting, a belief, a memory, a hypothetical. Each is a mental space in which the same entity can take a different value, as when a flower is red in reality but purple in a portrait. Formal semantics keeps these contexts apart because their logics differ (modal, temporal, doxastic, depictive); Fauconnier's mental-space theory treats them as one space-building operation. We ask which of these a transformer language model implements, and
summary: 通过一个共享路由器和值槽，Transformer语言模型实现了Fauconnier的统一机制。该模型在一个格式中使用了可重用的价值槽来存储属性内容，并使用因果上可操作的路由选择读取哪个空间。
key_insights: Transformer语言模型采用了Fauconnier的统一机制，实现了一个共享路由器和值槽。
一个子空间通过分布式对齐搜索训练控制一种类型的空间（如反事实、信念、虚构或时间），能够影响其他类型的子空间。
该机制驱动了推理并组合新的路由。
